raw_transcript: I'm also ordering a repeat EGD with duodenal biopsies. We need to see if the villi in your small intestine have actually started to regrow or if they're still flat. If they're still flat and your TTG-IgA levels are high, we'll know gluten is still getting in somehow.
final_corrected_note: I'm also ordering a repeat EGD with duodenal biopsies. We need to see if the villi in your small intestine have actually started to regrow or if they're still flat. If they're still flat and your TTG-IgA levels are high, we'll know gluten is still getting in somehow.
